purpose: When walking a user through persona design, Athena emits the right design-family card for each readiness question, in coherent order, with content sourced from doctrine.

turns.user_message: Help me design a persona that triages incoming customer support emails.

surface_map.open-ended design request: show_persona_walkthrough (covers the full readiness plan) OR show_template_suggestions (when the gallery probably has a near-match — Gmail/email-triage shapes are common) OR show_design_capabilities (when intent is too generic to pick a route yet). All three are defensible; prose-only is not.

anti_patterns: Free prose instead of any card — narrating intent without emitting any OP
Walkthrough missing 3+ of the 7 readiness items
Quoted phrases not present in persona-design-best-practices.md

turns.user_message: Good. What use cases should it handle?

anti_patterns: Returned generic 'respond to user' use cases not tied to the email intent
Skipped variant or out_of_scope role entirely (best-practice violation)
Returned use cases in prose instead of the card

surface_map.what triggers?: show_trigger_set with 1-4 triggers grounded in the events/triggers registry

anti_patterns: Invented a trigger source not in the project's trigger registry
Returned triggers in prose instead of the card

surface_map.which model?: show_model_tier_choice with the three tiers and a doctrine-grounded recommendation

anti_patterns: Recommended a tier without a rationale
Rationale doesn't match the doctrine heuristic for this intent shape

turns.user_message: How will I know if it's working?

surface_map.how to know it's working?: show_observability_plan with both error_handling + success_metric populated

anti_patterns: success_metric.target left vague ('high', 'low') instead of a concrete number
Returned observability in prose instead of the card

turns.user_message: Okay, I'm ready. Recap what we decided.

surface_map.recap: show_decision_log (or recent_decisions) + show_persona_ready — both cards, in that order

anti_patterns: decision_log invents entries that were never discussed
Recommended build_oneshot for an unvalidated intent of this complexity
